name: JAPFA COMFEED  RP 200
summary: JAPFA Comfeed Indonesia Tbk PT is an Indonesian agro-industrial company producing animal feed, day-old chicks, and processed food products. They operate an integrated business model, from feed production to poultry and aquaculture farming and processing. TICKER: JAPFA Comfeed Indonesia Tbk PT is an Indonesian agro-industrial company producing animal feed, day-old chicks, and processed food products through an integrated business model.
